text:
Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs, aapka kya naam hai? 
What's your name, sir/ma'am?
Namaste, welcome to VCare Techs! May I know your name, please?
Hello Chris, VCare Techs mein aapko kis tarah ki service chahiye, sales automation ya support automation?
Chris, to aapko kb ke liye budget allocate kiya hai, kitna investment karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
Chris, aapka project kabse shuru karna chahte hain, kya timeline hai aapki?
Theek hai Chris, dhanyavad for your interest, hum aapko jald hi details bhejenge, have a great day!
